testsuite.name: modelChecker.ModelCheckerTest
testsuite.system-out: s0-[act1]-s1 s0-[act2]-s2 s1-[act2]-s2 s2-[act2]-s0 s0-[act1]-s2 s2-[act2]-s0 AX p !AX p Query: (AX p ) s0 s2 Query: !((AX p )) s0 TRUE Query: True s0 s2 ! ( FALSE ) Query: !( False ) s0 s2 (((TRUE && FALSE) || (TRUE && ! ! ! ! !FALSE)) && (TRUE || FALSE)) Query: ((( True && False ) || ( True && !(!(!(!(!( False ))))))) && ( True || False )) s0 s2 (FALSE || TRUE) Query: ( False || True ) s0 s2 (TRUE && TRUE) Query: ( True && True ) s0 s2 p Query: p s0 s2 (p && q) Query: ( p && q ) s0 s2 ! ! TRUE Query: !(!( True )) s0 s2 FALSE Query: False s0
